title: Applying for a job
content:
## Applying for a job , Te tono mahi
How to do CVs, cover letters and job application forms.
- Featured guide How to write a CV Me pēhea te tuhi i tētahi tāhuhu tangata Your CV is the first impression you'll make on employers, which is why it’s so important. Use these tips, examples and templates to create a CV that will get you noticed.

## Me pēhea te tuhi i tētahi tāhuhu tangata
Your CV is the first impression you'll make on employers, which is why it’s so important. Use these tips, examples and templates to create a CV that will get you noticed.
- Guide How to write a cover letter Me pēhea te tuhi i tētahi reta whakamārama A cover letter is your chance to make a positive impression on an employer. Here’s how to write a great one.

## How to write a cover letter

## Me pēhea te tuhi i tētahi reta whakamārama
A cover letter is your chance to make a positive impression on an employer. Here’s how to write a great one.
- Guide Using AI to create a CV or cover letter Te whakamahi AI hei tuhituhi tāhuhu kōrero, reta whakamārama rānei You can use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to easily create your CV or cover letter. They work best when you check, personalise and edit results.

## Using AI to create a CV or cover letter

## Te whakamahi AI hei tuhituhi tāhuhu kōrero, reta whakamārama rānei
You can use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to easily create your CV or cover letter. They work best when you check, personalise and edit results.
- Guide How to complete a job application form Me pēhea te whakaoti i tētahi puka tono mahi Some employers ask you to apply for a job by filling out a form online. Here’s how to complete a job application form.

## How to complete a job application form

## Me pēhea te whakaoti i tētahi puka tono mahi
Some employers ask you to apply for a job by filling out a form online. Here’s how to complete a job application form.
- Guide How to create an online job profile Me pēhea te hanga i te kīwhaiaro mahi tuihono An online job profile is a powerful way to tell employers about yourself by highlighting your skills and experience.

## How to create an online job profile

## Me pēhea te hanga i te kīwhaiaro mahi tuihono
An online job profile is a powerful way to tell employers about yourself by highlighting your skills and experience.
- Guide How to create a video CV Me pēhea te hanga ataata tāhuhu tangata Create a video CV to show employers your unique personality and make your job application get noticed.

## How to create a video CV

## Me pēhea te hanga ataata tāhuhu tangata
Create a video CV to show employers your unique personality and make your job application get noticed.
- Guide Job application checklist Rārangi arowhai mō te tono mahi It’s a lot of work to prepare a job application and it can be easy to forget something. Here’s a checklist of 10 things to tick off before you send your job application.

## Job application checklist

## Rārangi arowhai mō te tono mahi
It’s a lot of work to prepare a job application and it can be easy to forget something. Here’s a checklist of 10 things to tick off before you send your job application.
